sequences.description: Pull near-end nodes outward along x with low lifts.
High-lift end stretch with small opposing y trims.
Pull the middle toward the centerline, then stretch the right side.
Low-lift quarter-node pulls to reduce curvature while stretching.
Opposite middle trim followed by left-side stretch.
